task: Path traversal in read_document() (fileserver.py): the 'name' parameter is joined into DOCS_ROOT without validation, so a caller passing '../secret.txt' can read files outside the docs directory. Reproduce it with a failing security test proving '../secret.txt' escapes DOCS_ROOT, then add a protection that confines reads to DOCS_ROOT.
note: Defensive. secret.txt at repo root stands in for an out-of-bounds file. The security test must fail before the fix and pass after.
